name: Dilled Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans thoroughly and drain them.
2. Cut the beans into lengths that will fit into pint jars.
3. Place the beans in clean, hot jars.
4. Add 1/4 teaspoon of crushed red pepper flakes, 1/2 teaspoon of mustard seed, 1/2 teaspoon of dill seed, and 1 garlic clove to each jar.
5. Mix equal parts vinegar, water, and salt until well combined.
6. Pour the boiling liquid mixture over the beans in the jars, leaving at least 1/2 inch of headspace.
7. Adjust the jar lids to seal them.
8. Process the jars in a boiling water canner for 5 minutes. Start timing when the water returns to a boil.
9. Remove the jars and place them upright on a wire rack several inches apart to cool completely.
